name: App bug
about: Report a problem with the macOS app, CLI, watcher, install, or restore flow
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
---

## What Happened

Describe the problem.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected PlainLink to do.

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Open PlainLink.
2. Copy or clean the affected URL.
3. Observe the problem.

## PlainLink Version

Paste the app or CLI version.

## macOS Version

Paste the macOS version and hardware type if relevant.

## Logs Or Output

Paste any relevant command output from `plainlink doctor`, `plainlink agent status`, or the terminal.
